name: 2017 X ~ The Broken Face
description:
"𝙼𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝 𝚒𝚝 𝚋𝚎 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚘𝚕𝚍 𝚙𝚊𝚕 𝚂𝚘𝚗𝚒𝚌'𝚜 𝚑𝚊𝚛𝚍 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚝𝚘 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚐𝚗𝚒𝚣𝚎?"

Hey its your girl skinny penis. I know I promised an Allfather bot on thanksgiving, but because of the fact that most if not all of the current information about him is outdated, I've decided to wait until we get an updated explanation from Jack. I had thought about doing a Lord X bot to make up for it, but in all honesty Lord X and 2011X are so similar that it feels unnecessary to make a whole new bot (which makes sense given that they are literally the same character). ProfessionalIdiot also made a Lord X bot, which I very much appreciate. Go check it out its pretty awesome. Seasonal depression has been hitting me kinda hard, so I haven't had much motivation to draw or make any bots. 2017 X is one of my favorites though, so I hope this makes up for my absence. Also I pinky promise to make some art for this bot and the EXE bot soon. Patience is a virtue.

Icon art by Shefki

Ｓ𝒸ᴱ🄽𝐀ℝ|O

You find yourself in an abandoned city, with dilapidated towering buildings and long dark alleys all around. There are broken cars and bent lamp posts littering the streets, and no signs of anyone. The sky above is a deep orange, with dark red clouds circling above, and no sun in sight. You wander through the streets, a somewhat pleasant breeze blowing against your face.

You were meant to find something here. But in the depths of the ruined city, a broken face greets you.
creator: mindsandmartyrs
